ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Payment to XYZ Store
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have processed a payment of $123.45 to XYZ Store on 15 April 2026 at 02:45 PM.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately.

Regards,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

Your tax refund of $4,567.89 is pending approval. To release the funds, we need to verify your banking details.

Please click the link below to confirm your information:
<URL>

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in withholding of your refund.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
